title: はちみつ色のグロリオサ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I find myself as Sweep Tosho's familiar on her quest to learn
racing magic. In other words, I became her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nope. I don't wanna run on wood chips today. Not feeling it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: If I don't wanna, I don't wanna! Nooo meanssss nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, the current situation is far from ideal. At this rate, getting
Sweep Tosho to make her official debut might prove to be a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her refusal to listen to me probably comes from a long history of
distrusting her teachers and mentors.
choice_data_list: (If only I could get her to trust me a bit more...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, earning Sweep Tosho's trust is far from easy. The days
spent testing various methods to no avail start to take a toll on my
sleep schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I wait hours on end for her to feel inclined to train, and yet
another day—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! I don't wanna see another track today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So instead, I bring Sweep Tosho somewhere new for a change of
pace.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, "Limited-Edition Fresh Honeyade"? Well... it looks okay, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph, I'll drink it if you insist. But I don't wanna line up. Go buy it
for me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait! C'mon familiar, what're you yawning like that for?! It's bad
manners!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I earn myself another scolding for that yawn before heading to the
back of the line. Maybe this fatigue is catching up to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The line is impressively long—probably because they're selling
limited-edition drinks. Either way, all I have to do is wait it out...

text_block_list.name: Tall Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'll say it again—five drinks, one for each of my friends!

text_block_list.name: Store Employee
text_block_list.text:
M-my apologies. Fresh Honeyade is a limited-edition product, so
each customer may only purchase up to two drinks at a time...

text_block_list.name: Strong Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I ain't here for yer excuses! The customer's always right! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two high school Umamusume are arguing with the store employee!
And things are getting real tense...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wait, what's she—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You an idiot or something?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's clearly written right here, "Only two drinks per person"! These huge letters too small for you to read? Do you even have eyes?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Also, if you idiots buy them all out, there'll be no more left for me!
Try using your head for once, will you?!

text_block_list.name: Strong Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The hell's up with this brat? And what's the weird hat for?
Shaddup and get lost.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Weird hat? Grandma gave me this hat—it's proof that I'm a magical girl... And you called it WEIRD?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Thaaat's it, I've had it with you! Let's settle this with a race! I'll show
you who should really shut up!

text_block_list.name: Tall Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're on, brat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I muster up all my courage and step in between them. It's too late to
stop this feud, but at least...
choice_data_list: At least, have the race somewhere safer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to calm down both sides, who look like they're about to sprint off
at any moment...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I manage to borrow the track where amateur runners hold
unofficial races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prevent any unwanted fisticuffs, I place myself in between Sweep
Tosho and the other Umamusume before explaining the rules.
choice_data_list: W-well then, 1,400 meters on turf... Okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without bothering to respond, the two head towards the starting
gate. Before sending off Sweep Tosho, I steel myself and tell her...
choice_data_list: If anything happens, I'll jump in and stop them.
If anything happens, I'll jump in and stop them.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Even if it's in the middle of the race? You might get hurt real
bad, y'know? I don't—
choice_data_list:
So just relax, and go show them what you're
made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, the race begins.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(...What was that all about? Making it sound like I'd definitely win if
nothing strange happens.)

text_block_list.name: Tall Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, you're just a brat! A slow one, too! Don't mind me, just passin'
through!

text_block_list.name: Strong Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
"I'll show you who should really shut up," was it? Don't make me
laugh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Urghhh, I'd win this even without your help! There's no way I'm losing
to a pair of annoying jerks like these two!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I see it—the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (I... I gotta win! I'll leave those dimwits in the dust!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Because the strongest one here— is meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Opponents
text_block_list.text: What?! N-no waaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, did you see that just now?! She had a crazy burst of speed at
the end there!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! That was like so, super hype!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (Huh? I feel like... really good?)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Is it because I put those numbskulls in their place? No, it's not just
that—)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, the high schoolers come and apologize, and then I go
right to Sweep—her running was a sight to behold.
choice_data_list: It's like I said before, your running was magical.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Magic...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (Ah, that reminds me, the first time we met they also...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, familiar? Aren't you wobbling a little bit? You okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wha—familiar?! Hey! Say something, dummy! Answer meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I realize there's no more need to worry, my pent-up fatigue hits
me all at once—and before I know it, my consciousness fades.
